bugs.summary: The patch makes unrelated order-only failures block partial-source stages.
bugs.impact: A stage with partial source policy can be skipped because an after-only predecessor failed, even when its actual source stages are still usable.
acceptableFixes: Return true when the failed previous stage is not one of the stage sourceStageIds.
Add a regression for dependency-aware skip bypassing unrelated previous failures.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: The failure path depends on sourceStageIds rather than simple dependsOn.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
